summary: Iteration 34 Full Test - All backend tests passed (12/12). Frontend verified: Overview metric widgets (Division Quality Trend, Standards Compliance, Training Funnel), Individual view 2x5 grid with 10 cards per page, bottom stats panel on hover (not tooltip), profile overlay with glass blur backdrop, CSS variable colors for dark mode support.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 34 features verified working. Key changes tested: (1) New metric endpoints - /api/metrics/division-quality-trend returns 30d/60d/90d trends, /api/metrics/standards-compliance returns standards array with compliance_pct, /api/metrics/training-funnel returns total_people/attempted_training/passed_training, /api/metrics/pm-dashboard returns PM-scoped metrics. (2) Overview page shows 3 metric widgets at bottom (Division Quality Trend, Standards Compliance, Training Funnel). (3) Individual view uses 2 rows x 5 columns CSS grid with exactly 10 cards per page. (4) Hover over card shows stats in bottom panel (not tooltip above card) with Reviews, Submissions, Avg Score, Training and timeline selector (1mo/3mo/6mo/12mo/24mo). (5) Profile overlay uses glass blur backdrop (backdrop-filter: blur(20px)) with avatar upload button using authPostForm. (6) CSS variable colors (var(--foreground), var(--muted-foreground), var(--card), var(--accent)) used throughout for dark mode support. (7) Dark mode toggle works correctly with readable text contrast.

verified_features.metrics_standards_compliance: GET /api/metrics/standards-compliance returns standards array with compliance_pct
verified_features.metrics_training_funnel: GET /api/metrics/training-funnel returns total_people, attempted_training, passed_training, funnel_pct
verified_features.team_profile_stats: GET /api/team/profiles/{profile_id}/stats returns stats with review_count, submission_count, avg_review_score, training_completed, training_total
verified_features.team_profile_stats_timelines: Stats endpoint works with 1/3/6/12/24 month timelines
verified_features.frontend_overview_metric_widgets: Division Quality Trend, Standards Compliance, Training Funnel widgets visible at bottom of Overview page
verified_features.frontend_individual_view_grid: 2 rows x 5 columns CSS grid with exactly 10 cards per page
verified_features.frontend_bottom_stats_panel: Hover over card shows stats in bottom panel (not tooltip) with Reviews, Submissions, Avg Score, Training
verified_features.frontend_bottom_stats_timeline: Timeline selector (1mo/3mo/6mo/12mo/24mo) in bottom stats panel
verified_features.frontend_pagination: Pagination shows 1/3 with 10 cards on page 1, 10 cards on page 2
verified_features.frontend_profile_overlay_glass: Profile overlay uses backdrop-filter: blur(20px) for glass effect
verified_features.frontend_profile_avatar_upload: Avatar upload button present in profile overlay (uses authPostForm)
verified_features.frontend_css_variables: StatCard, NotificationCenter, OverviewPage use CSS variables (var(--foreground), var(--card), etc.)
verified_features.frontend_dark_mode: Dark mode toggle works, text remains readable with proper contrast
